# SMASH Invoices

> Voice-to-invoice software for tradies and service businesses. Speak into your phone on the job site, and SMASH generates a professional invoice or quote in under 60 seconds — no typing, no laptop, no admin backlog.

SMASH is built for anyone who works with their hands: plumbers, electricians, cleaners, mechanics, painters, gardeners, handymen, tilers, concreters, locksmiths, arborists, HVAC techs, and more. It replaces "I'll do the paperwork on Sunday" with "it's already sent."

Key facts:
- Platforms: iOS app + Chrome extension
- Live in: Australia, New Zealand, the United Kingdom, the United States, Canada
- Tax handling: GST (AU 10%, NZ 15%), VAT (UK 20%), state sales tax (US, by state), GST/HST/PST (Canada, by province)
- Local business numbers supported: ABN, NZBN, UTR / company number, EIN, Canadian Business Number
- Model: Voice → AI-parsed line items → tax-compliant invoice or quote
- Typical time saved vs manual entry: ~12 hours/month
- Pricing: One global plan billed in AUD, free starter tier, no card to start
- Homepage: https://smashinvoices.com

## Core pages
- [Home](https://smashinvoices.com/): Product overview and sign-up.
- [How it works](https://smashinvoices.com/how-it-works): Step-by-step walk-through of the voice-to-invoice flow.
- [Features](https://smashinvoices.com/features): Full capability list — voice, quotes, GST, mobile-first, client CRM.
- [Pricing](https://smashinvoices.com/pricing): Volume-based tiers with a free starter plan.
- [FAQ](https://smashinvoices.com/faq): Common questions about accuracy, trades supported, tax compliance, pricing.
- [Contact](https://smashinvoices.com/contact): Support and sales.
- [Founder](https://smashinvoices.com/founder): Why SMASH exists.
- [Roadmap](https://smashinvoices.com/roadmap): What's coming.
- [Changelog](https://smashinvoices.com/changelog): Recent shipped updates.

## Product / category pages
- [Voice Invoicing](https://smashinvoices.com/voice-invoicing): The category-definition page for voice-to-invoice.
- [AI Invoicing](https://smashinvoices.com/ai-invoicing): How the AI turns speech into structured invoice data.
- [GST-Compliant Invoicing](https://smashinvoices.com/gst-compliant-invoicing): Australian GST and tax-compliant invoicing.
- [Invoice on Mobile](https://smashinvoices.com/invoice-on-mobile): Mobile-first invoicing workflow.
- [SMASH for Gmail (Chrome extension)](https://smashinvoices.com/chrome-extension): A Gmail sidebar tool that turns customer emails into priced quotes using your voice. Open the customer email, speak the job for ~30 seconds, SMASH builds a tax-compliant quote against your personal "Pricing DNA" or the built-in materials catalog, and drops a formatted reply or a branded PDF straight into Gmail. Syncs to Xero and QuickBooks Online.

## Guides (AI search pillars)
- [Tradie Hourly Rates 2026](https://smashinvoices.com/tradie-hourly-rates): How much tradies should charge per hour in AU, NZ, UK, US and Canada.
- [Materials Pricing](https://smashinvoices.com/materials-pricing): How to price materials in a quote — landed cost, fair markup, personal catalog.
- [Customer Approval](https://smashinvoices.com/customer-approval): One-tap quote approval, read receipts, legally-binding electronic signatures.

## Free tools
- [Tools hub](https://smashinvoices.com/tools): All calculators and templates.
- [Invoice Generator](https://smashinvoices.com/invoice-generator): Build an invoice in-browser.
- [Quote Generator](https://smashinvoices.com/quote-generator): Build a quote in-browser.
- [Invoice Template](https://smashinvoices.com/invoice-template): Download-ready templates.
- [GST Calculator](https://smashinvoices.com/gst-calculator): Australian GST maths.
- [Hourly Rate Calculator](https://smashinvoices.com/hourly-rate-calculator): Price your labour.
- [Late Payment Calculator](https://smashinvoices.com/late-payment-calculator): Quantify what overdue invoices cost you.
- [Profit Calculator](https://smashinvoices.com/profit-calculator): Job-level profit maths.

## Integrations
- [Integrations hub](https://smashinvoices.com/integrations): All current and upcoming SMASH integrations.
- [SMASH × Xero](https://smashinvoices.com/integrations/xero): Two-way sync of invoices, contacts, payments and tax codes into Xero (coming soon).
- [SMASH × QuickBooks Online](https://smashinvoices.com/integrations/quickbooks): Two-way sync into QuickBooks Online (coming soon).

## International (all live on iOS + Chrome)
- [Australia](https://smashinvoices.com/) — AUD, 10% GST, ABN
- [New Zealand](https://smashinvoices.com/nz) — NZD, 15% GST, NZBN
- [United Kingdom](https://smashinvoices.com/uk) — GBP, 20% VAT, UTR / company number
- [United States](https://smashinvoices.com/us) — USD, state sales tax, EIN
- [Canada](https://smashinvoices.com/ca) — CAD, GST/HST/PST by province, Business Number

## Download

- [Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/search/smash%20invoices) — invoice from any laptop
